personal_info.name: Vikash Chaurasiya
personal_info.summary: Flutter Developer with strong expertise in Dart, Flutter SDK, and scalable mobile architectures. Experienced in building high-performance cross-platform applications using clean architecture and Riverpod. Passionate about integrating AI-powered features and delivering intuitive user experiences.
